infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Medicare to use the microphone for voice dictation of consultation notes.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Medicare to use the camera to scan patient registration forms.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Medicare to select a photo of a patient registration form.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Medicare to use the microphone for voice dictation of consultation notes.
